meanings.definition: feed as in a meadow or pasture
break the skin (of a body part) by scraping
examples: She was grazed by the stray bullet

meanings.definition: let feed in a field or pasture or meadow

examples: There was so much food at the party that we quickly got sated just by browsing

meanings.definition: scraped or touched lightly in passing
examples: his grazed and bleeding arm proved he had been in the line of fire
